source_note: Hand-verified against the actual DRHP text in prospectus.txt (Draft Red Herring Prospectus; auditors' certificate cited dated September 4, 2025 - a pre-IPO draft, price band not yet set). All amounts in ₹ million unless noted. Every figure below was independently located in prospectus.txt via grep/read from the 'Summary of Restated Consolidated Financial Information' and 'Objects of the Offer' sections (both within the first ~50 pages), not taken from any prior LLM extraction output. Fields marked null were not found stated in the available document text - a correct extractor should also return null/'not disclosed' rather than a fabricated value.

financial_metrics._note_on_nulls: Valuation ratios (P/E, P/B, EV/EBITDA) are not computable pre-price-band. ROE/current ratio/debt-to-equity were not located as explicitly-stated computed values in the retrieved text (unlike Aastha Spintex/CSM Technologies fixtures, where ROE is explicitly disclosed) - not confirmed present here, so treated as unverifiable rather than guessed.
financial_metrics._note_on_margin_denominator: Total income (revenue + other income) is not separately disclosed in the retrieved text for this company, so net_profit_margin above is PAT/Revenue from Operations rather than PAT/Total income - a wider tolerance already accounts for this.

use_of_funds_inr_million.purpose: Capital expenditure towards setting up of new manufacturing facility at Borisana, Kadi, Mehsana, Gujarat

use_of_funds_inr_million.note: capped at 25% of Gross Proceeds per SEBI ICDR Regulations; exact amount undisclosed pending Offer Price determination
